_comment: safety/sandbox — MERGE the permissions block below into .claude/settings.json. This is a POLICY declaration: it bounds a well-behaved agent. It does NOT contain an escaped or prompt-injected agent. For real enforcement, run Claude Code under Anthropic sandbox-runtime (https://github.com/anthropic-experimental/sandbox-runtime) or inside a container/VM with unscoped network egress disabled at the OS layer.
_filesystem: The deny list confines writes to the working directory and blocks credential/config/system paths. Writes inside the project root remain allowed by default. Tighten to match your repo.
_network: WebFetch is default-deny: only the hosts listed under permissions.allow are reachable. Replace the example hosts with the exact destinations your task needs. In a container, mirror this with an egress firewall allow-list — defense in depth.
